parameters.jsCode:
const out = [];
for (const item of $input.all()) {
  const j = item.json || {};
  const row = [
    new Date().toISOString(),
    j.message_id || '',
    j.thread_id || '',
    j.received_at || '',
    j.from_name || '',
    j.from_email || '',
    j.subject || '',
    j.category || '',
    j.priority || '',
    String(Boolean(j.action_required)),
    j.summary_short || '',
    j.summary_long || '',
    j.vendor || '',
    j.product || '',
    String(j.amount ?? ''),
    j.currency || '',
    j.billing_cycle || '',
    j.renewal_date || '',
    j.due_date || '',
    j.invoice_number || '',
    j.payment_status || '',
    j.cancel_url || '',
    Array.isArray(j.attachment_names) ? j.attachment_names.join(', ') : '',
    Array.isArray(j.addLabelNames) ? j.addLabelNames.join(', ') : '',
    String(j.confidence ?? ''),
    'logged',
  ];
  out.push({ json: { append_url: 'https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/1MXnIzaqkGsK2KqPxrHzHhGVLKOl8FbpxgZHQ2-tHHCQ/values/mail_log!A:Z:append?valueInputOption=RAW&insertDataOption=INSERT_ROWS', append_body: JSON.stringify({ majorDimension: 'ROWS', values: [row] }) } });
}
return out;

const out = [];
for (const item of $input.all()) {
  const j = item.json || {};
  if (!['subscription', 'payment'].includes(j.category)) continue;
  const row = [
    new Date().toISOString(),
    j.message_id || '',
    j.thread_id || '',
    j.vendor || '',
    j.product || '',
    String(j.amount ?? ''),
    j.currency || '',
    j.billing_cycle || '',
    j.renewal_date || '',
    j.trial_end_date || '',
    j.cancel_url || '',
    j.summary_short || '',
    '',
    '',
    'logged',
  ];
  out.push({ json: {
    append_url: 'https://sheets.googleapis.com/v4/spreadsheets/1MXnIzaqkGsK2KqPxrHzHhGVLKOl8FbpxgZHQ2-tHHCQ/values/subscriptions!A:O:append?valueInputOption=RAW&insertDataOption=INSERT_ROWS',
    append_body: JSON.stringify({ majorDimension: 'ROWS', values: [row] }),
    vendor: j.vendor || '',
    product: j.product || '',
    amount: String(j.amount ?? ''),
    currency: j.currency || '',
    renewal_date: j.renewal_date || '',
    trial_end_date: j.trial_end_date || '',
    cancel_url: j.cancel_url || '',
    summary_short: j.summary_short || '',
    message_id: j.message_id || '',
    subject: j.subject || '',
  } });
}
return out;
